Calculation.Text: Case( Get(SystemPlatform) <> 4 ; sourceUrl; not useWrapper ; sourceUrl; "data:text/html, " & List( "<!DOCTYPE html>"; "<html>"; " <script>"; " function callIntoIFrame(fnName, data, fetchId) {"; " var target = document.getElementById(\"app_iframe\");"; " "; " const params = {"; " functionName: fnName,"; " data: data,"; " fetchId: fetchId,"; " };"; " try {"; " target.contentWindow.postMessage("; " params,"; " \"" & sourceUrl & "\" "; " );"; " } catch (e) {"; " console.log(\"posting to wrapper error\", e);"; " }"; " }"; " window.addEventListener("; " \"message\","; " function (e) {"; " let params = e.data;"; " // if this a string parse it, if not, use it as is"; " if (typeof params === \"string\") {"; " try {"; " params = JSON.parse(params);"; " } catch (e) {"; " console.log(`bridging parameter incorrect: ${params}`);"; " return;"; " }"; " } else {"; " params = params;"; " }"; " if (params.forFM) {"; " FileMaker.PerformScript(params.script, params.data, params.options);"; " }"; " },"; " false"; " );"; " </script>"; " <body style=\"padding: 0px; overflow: hidden\">"; " <iframe"; " id=\"app_iframe\" "; " style=\"margin:0;position:fixed;top:0;bottom:0,right:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;\" "; " frameborder=\"0\" "; " src=\"" & sourceUrl & "?useWrapper=1\" "; " ></iframe>"; " </body>"; "</html>" ) )

Field.name: ID
Field.comment: Unique identifier of each record in this table

Field.name: kTrue
Field.comment: constant field containing a boolean "True" value

Field.name: CreationTimestamp
Field.comment: Date and time each record was created

Field.name: CreationAccount
Field.comment: Account name of the user who created each record

Field.name: ModifyTimestamp
Field.comment: Date and time each record was last modified

Field.name: ModifyAccount
Field.comment: Account name of the user who last modified each record

Theme.name: com.filemaker.theme.apex_blue

LayoutObject.name: web

Calculation.Text: // wrap everything in the WebViewer compatible iFrame (only takes effect in WebDirect) ProofKitWvUrl ( Case ( // If this var is true, we want to see the changes from our dev server $$WebDevMode ; "http://localhost:5175" ; // otherwise, load the HTML from the field "data:text/html;charset=UTF-8," & ProofKitApps::HTML ) ; 1 )

LayoutObject.name: web

PrivilegeSet.name: [Data Entry Only]
PrivilegeSet.Description: write access to all records, no design access

PrivilegeSet.name: [Read-Only Access]
PrivilegeSet.Description: read access to all records, no design access, write access to all global fields

ExtendedPrivilege.name: fmreauthenticate10
ExtendedPrivilege.Description: Require re-authentication after the specified minutes in sleep/background.

ExtendedPrivilege.name: fmxml
ExtendedPrivilege.Description: Access via XML Web Publishing - FMS only

ExtendedPrivilege.name: fmphp
ExtendedPrivilege.Description: Access via PHP Web Publishing - FMS only

ExtendedPrivilege.name: fmextscriptaccess
ExtendedPrivilege.Description: Allow Apple events and ActiveX to perform FileMaker operations

ExtendedPrivilege.name: fmurlscript
ExtendedPrivilege.Description: Allow URLs to run FileMaker scripts

Comment.value: Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0
This script ensures the MCP connector window is open, allowing ProofKit MCP to interact directly with this FileMaker file.
This variable might be set when calling this script via the fmp:// URL protocol if you need to set a custom URL here.
Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0

Calculation.Text: Let( [ tableName = $tableName; filtered = FilterValues( TableNames( Get( FileName)); tableName); filteredStripReturn = GetValue ( filtered ; 1 ) ]; filteredStripReturn = tableName )
JSONSetElement( "{}"; [ "error"; "tableName is missing"; JSONString ]; [ "code"; 106; JSONNumber ]; [ "tableNamesInFile"; Substitute( TableNames( Get( FileName)); "¶"; ","); JSONString ] )

Comment.value: Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0
Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0
Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0
Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0
Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0

Text.value: {"fieldSeparator":"31","maxRows":100,"params":[{"type":"text","value":"Jake"},{"type":"text","value":"Smith"}],"rowSeparator":30,"sql":"SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM contacts WHERE LastName = ? AND FirstName = ? FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY"}

Calculation.Text: JSONSetElement ( ""; ["error"; "FileMaker evaluate error. (" & $calcError & "). This is not a SQL Error. The FileMaker script is broken." ; JSONString ] )

Comment.value: Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0
Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0
Copy this script to create your own versions of scripts that can be called from a web viewer.
get a result in any way you know how!
Any way you know how that doesn't leave the layout (unless you're running this script on server)
If you need a new context, either: - open an new window and close it at the end of this block - OR run a sub-script on server using PSOS
Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0
Copy this script to create your own versions of scripts that can be called from a web viewer.
#### Remove this block if you don't want to run the fetch on server
This ensures this script will always run on server (if the file is hosted)

Calculation.Text: Get ( ConnectionState ) > 0 and not PatternCount ( Get ( ApplicationVersion ) ; "Server" )

Step.name: Perform Script on Server with Callback

Comment.value: get a result in any way you know how!
Any way you know how that doesn't leave the layout (unless you're running this script on server)
If you need a new context, either: - open an new window and close it at the end of this block - OR run a sub-script on server using PSOS
We're not on server, send the data directly back to the webviewer
On server, we'll return the callback value which will be picked up by the callback script
Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0
Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0
get a result in any way you know how!
Any way you know how that doesn't leave the layout.
Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0
#### Remove this block if you don't want to run the fetch on server
This ensures this script will always run on server (if the file is hosted)

Calculation.Text: Get ( ConnectionState ) > 0 and not PatternCount ( Get ( ApplicationVersion ) ; "Server" )

Step.name: Perform Script on Server with Callback

Comment.value: get a result in any way you know how!
Any way you know how that doesn't leave the layout.
We're not on server, send the data directly back to the webviewer
On server, we'll return the callback value which will be picked up by the callback script
Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0
This script is conly called from script receiving requests from WebViewers
You will never need to edit this script
@param {string} callback.webViewerName the name of the webViewer
@param {string} callback.fetchID the request in the proper api request format
@param {string} callback.fn the name of the function that will be used
@param {object} json.result the data to send back to the WebViwer

Calculation.Text: "No webviewer named " & Quote ( $WebViewerName ) & " found on this layout."

Comment.value: Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0
Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0

LEGACY SCRIPT: Only needed if you want to use the FileMaker webviewer as your development browser. Otherwise, just use the "Connect to MCP" script and use any other browser (Chrome, embedded Claude Code, etc)
Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0

LEGACY SCRIPT: Only needed if you want to use the FileMaker webviewer as your development browser. Otherwise, just use the "Connect to MCP" script and use any other browser (Chrome, embedded Claude Code, etc)
Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0

ChunkList.Chunk: ( "<!DOCTYPE html>"; "<html>"; " <script>"; " function callIntoIFrame(fnName, data, fetchId) {"; " var target = document.getElementById(\"app_iframe\");"; " "; " const params = {"; " functionName: fnName,"; " data: data,"; " fetchId: fetchId,"; " };"; " try {"; " target.contentWindow.postMessage("; " params,"; " \"" &

& "\" "; " );"; " } catch (e) {"; " console.log(\"posting to wrapper error\", e);"; " }"; " }"; " window.addEventListener("; " \"message\","; " function (e) {"; " let params = e.data;"; " // if this a string parse it, if not, use it as is"; " if (typeof params === \"string\") {"; " try {"; " params = JSON.parse(params);"; " } catch (e) {"; " console.log(`bridging parameter incorrect: ${params}`);"; " return;"; " }"; " } else {"; " params = params;"; " }"; " if (params.forFM) {"; " FileMaker.PerformScript(params.script, params.data, params.options);"; " }"; " },"; " false"; " );"; " </script>"; " <body style=\"padding: 0px; overflow: hidden\">"; " <iframe"; " id=\"app_iframe\" "; " style=\"margin:0;position:fixed;top:0;bottom:0,right:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;\" "; " frameborder=\"0\" "; " src=\"" &
// wrap everything in the WebViewer compatible iFrame (only takes effect in WebDirect)
// If this var is true, we want to see the changes from our dev server
// otherwise, load the HTML from the field
& "). This is not a SQL Error. The FileMaker script is broken." ;

ObjectList._4CF75BFA-8491-4350-8EAA-3650EACE3CA3: #Copyright © 2026 Proof Systems & Humans. All rights reserved. Learn more at https://proofkit.proof.sh v2.0.0

ObjectList._B0F58711-508F-443F-AA12-546AA3A366D4: Select Window [ Name: "proofkit MCP Server Connector"; Current file ]
ObjectList._EC33ABEF-9444-450E-98F1-BDE05199E8B3: New Window [ Style: Document; Name: "proofkit MCP Server Connector"; Using layout: “ProofKit MCP Connector” (ProofKitApps); Close: Yes; Minimize: Yes; Maximize: Yes; Resize: Yes; Menu Bar: Yes; Dim parent window: No; Toolbars: Yes ]
ObjectList._83CB6C4A-949A-4E92-9092-6804C5796B98: Show/Hide Toolbars [ Include Edit Record Toolbar; Hide ]
ObjectList._FCFC4148-F9D0-427A-B765-2E619CC3DCA1: #This variable might be set when calling this script via the fmp:// URL protocol if you need to set a custom URL here.
